title: Iron Barrels
description: A mod that adds different tiers of barrels. (Ex:- Iron Barrel, Gold Barrel).
body:
![All of the barrels beside eachother](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4bdd2e7052fdddcb40337986d4cbbcc8d7135c3.png)
**-Supports Forge, NeoForge, and Fabric.**

**-Fabric version requires _[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)_.**

-Iron Barrels mod adds **different tiers of barrels** that increase in storage as the tiers go up.

-You can either upgrade the barrels by **crafting the specific tier you need** or using a **barrel upgrade**.
  
-How upgrades work is that for example if you have an **iron to gold barrel upgrade**, you can right click on your **iron barrel to turn it into a gold barrel** with all of the items inside

-The **higher the tier the more space** the barrel has to store your items inside of, _**diamond barrel is the max amount of slots for 1.15**_ and has a bit under **110 slots of storage**! However in 1.16.5+ there is a **Netherite Barrel** with nearly **140 slots of storage**! You can use this mod in **1.12.2 with FutureMC installed** and it will add the **Netherite Barrel**.

-There is an obsidian barrel which stores the same amount as diamond barrel just harder and has the properties of an obsidian block (High blast resistance and hard to break).

-Report any bugs in the Curseforge comment section.

-No known bugs as of now.

**Inspired by Iron Chests**

**_[Iron Barrels Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-barrels-forge)_**

**[Support me pls](https://ko-fi.com/fluffy654)**
